name: Summer Fruit Bowl
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat, cook water, sugar, and lime juice for 15 minutes or until the mixture becomes a light syrup. Stir in mint leaves; cover and refrigerate until well chilled.
2. Cut watermelon into bite-sized pieces; discard seeds. Cut cantaloupe into bite-sized pieces; cut unpeeled plums and nectarines into wedges. Combine the cut-up fruits with grapes and arrange in a very large bowl. Pour the chilled syrup through a strainer over the fruit; gently toss to mix well. Cover and refrigerate, stirring occasionally, until flavors are well blended.
